title: Department Manager Vacancy at Titan Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Titan Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company Digital Technologies:
Titan Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company Digital Technologies!
